sections.heading: Company overview
sections.text: MASA (Medical Access & Service Advantage) was founded in 1974 as Medical Air Services Association, pioneering the first prepaid membership program for emergency air transportation. MASA now offers a range of air and ground medical transportation solutions and membership benefits to companies and individuals worldwide. With over 400 team members, MASA operates throughout the U.S. and in 14 international locations, protecting more than two million members globally.

sections.heading: What MASA does
sections.text: MASA protects members from the high, often unexpected cost of emergency medical transportation, stepping in where health insurance coverage may fall short. Members send MASA their ambulance or air transport bill after an emergency, and MASA covers the eligible out-of-pocket cost. MASA is not itself a medical transportation provider and utilizes third-party transportation service providers rather than owning or leasing vehicles or aircraft.

sections.heading: Mission
sections.text: MASA's stated mission is to provide industry-leading medical transportation solutions for its members and to protect them with compassion when facing major medical emergencies, on the premise that many people are unaware of how insufficient their health coverage is until an accident happens.
